title: Update to the "users" object
excerpt: We recently added the non_active argument to the users object! This allows you to return all non active users on an account. Take a look at our documentation to see it in action! :sunglasses:

posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml: We recently added the non_active argument to the users object! This allows you to return all non active users on an account. Take a look at our documentation to see it in action!
